info.name: ContactWork API
info.description: Postman collection for ContactWork. The API imports contacts, generates personalized PDFs, sends emails, and syncs replies or bounces from Gmail.

item.name: Mail Health
item.description: Verifies SMTP and IMAP connectivity using the configured Gmail credentials.

item.name: Import Contacts
item.description: Imports contacts from CSV. Existing emails are skipped, so the operation is idempotent.

item.name: List Contacts
item.description: Returns contacts. Optional query parameters: status, email, organization.

item.name: Get Contact By Selector
item.description: Returns one contact by UUID or email selector with full status timestamps and SMTP message id.

item.name: Update Contact Note
item.description: Stores a free-form operator note on the contact. Selector can be UUID or email.

item.name: Preview Letter PDF
item.description: Generates a personalized PDF letter for the given UUID or email selector and returns it as binary PDF.

item.name: Send One Contact
item.description: Sends one message only for the specified UUID or email selector.

item.name: Start Batch Send
item.description: Starts asynchronous sending for contacts currently in NEW status only.

item.name: Send Status
item.description: Returns whether the batch sender is running, what statuses are eligible for batch sending, and aggregated counts by status.

item.name: History By Selector
item.description: Returns the stored message history for a contact, addressed by UUID or email.

item.name: Inbox Sync
item.description: Reads Gmail IMAP inbox, updates contacts to REPLIED or BOUNCED, and stores inbound messages in history. Matching is strict by reply headers and outbound message id.
